lineage.Process: ExportFeatures "Kegonsa Panels" "C:\Users\steve\OneDrive - UW-Madison\0_Research\Agrivoltaics\Solar Sites Map\KegonsaGrid.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Shape__Length "Shape__Length" false true true 0 Double 0 0,First,#,Kegonsa Panels,Shape__Length,-1,-1;Shape__Area "Shape__Area" false true true 0 Double 0 0,First,#,Kegonsa Panels,Shape__Area,-1,-1;Panel_Type "Panel_Type" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,Kegonsa Panels,Panel_Type,0,254;GlobalID "GlobalID" false false true 38 Text 0 0,First,#,Kegonsa Panels,GlobalID,-1,-1;CreationDate "CreationDate" false true true 8 Date 0 1,First,#,Kegonsa Panels,CreationDate,-1,-1;Creator "Creator" false true true 128 Text 0 0,First,#,Kegonsa Panels,Creator,0,127;EditDate "EditDate" false true true 8 Date 0 1,First,#,Kegonsa Panels,EditDate,-1,-1;Editor "Editor" false true true 128 Text 0 0,First,#,Kegonsa Panels,Editor,0,127" #

CalculateGeometryAttributes KegonsaGrid "Easting INSIDE_X" # # # SAME_AS_INPUT

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
